approvalSource: Steve gave GREEN LIGHT for the SOURCE-LIFECYCLE-EXPANSION-001 plan with visibility/control-only constraints and explicit no-ingestion gates.
notes: Approval covers only the source lifecycle visibility/control layer, the additive /api/foundation/source-lifecycle endpoint, Foundation route /foundation#source-lifecycle, all-source/all-target lifecycle status, metadata-only evidence refs, verifier/process coverage, and manual UI proof. It does not approve new extraction targets, quota increases, Strategy Hub activation, Scoper, Agent Factory, corpus expansion, research cleanup, Action Review applying, or a new feature lane.
